source_authority: FBIL (Financial Benchmarks India Pvt Ltd) — mandated by RBI since July 10, 2018
data_notes: FBIL (fbil.org.in) is the RBI-mandated official source for INR/USD reference rates since July 2018. Direct fetch returned ECONNREFUSED. RBI reference rate archive (rbi.org.in/scripts/referenceratearchive.aspx) requires an interactive form submission — not accessible via automated fetch. FEDAI quarterly PDF (fedai.org.in) was 404. NSE India mirror timed out. No third-party aggregator data used per data integrity policy. ACTION REQUIRED: Manually visit https://www.fbil.org.in and download monthly average rates for Apr 2025 – Mar 2026, then populate the series array below.
notes: MANUAL FETCH REQUIRED. Visit fbil.org.in → Reference Rates → Historical → USD/INR → select Apr 2025 to Mar 2026 → download CSV → populate series.
